title: 10 best herbal teas for inflamed gums
intro_desc: Herbal teas for inflamed gums are natural remedies that soothe and calm inflamed gum tissues, providing relief from pain, swelling, and discomfort. These teas work by reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and promoting healing. The best herbal teas for inflamed gums include Salvia officinalis, Echinacea purpurea, Achillea millefolium, Eucalyptus globulus, Melissa officinalis, Sanguinaria canadensis, Calendula officinalis, Ginkgo biloba, Mentha x piperita, and Hydrastis canadensis. If left untreated, inflamed gums can lead to difficulty eating, speaking, and even social isolation due to embarrassment and pain.
